nasb.text: House and wealth are an inheritance from fathers, But a prudent wife is from the Lord.

esv.text: House and wealth are inherited from fathers, but a prudent wife is from the Lord.

cnv.text: 房屋與財富是祖宗遺留的產業； 唯有明慧的妻子是耶和華所賜的。

ccb.text: 房屋钱财是祖先的遗产， 贤慧之妻乃耶和华所赐。

csbs.text: 房屋和财物来自祖先的继业， 而明达的妻子来自耶和华。
